## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the motivation?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about, if any.

## Additional context

How this fits koshell's direction (human-centric shared terminal; AI beside the terminal,
not above it), plus any other context.
